assertions.reason: `pairing_flow_test.dart` passed for valid scan review, malformed rescan feedback, and reused-payload rescan feedback; the related `pairing_qr_validator_test.dart` expired-payload case also passed, covering the remaining rejection branch used by the widget error state.

`valid scan is reviewed and requires explicit trust confirmation` passed, confirming the scan reaches a review screen, shows `Confirm bridge trust`, keeps secure storage empty before confirmation, and only persists trust/session after `Confirm trust`.
`cancel from confirmation leaves app in clean unpaired state` passed, confirming cancel returns to `Pair your phone to this Mac` and leaves the trusted bridge identity unset.
`same phone cannot silently trust a second Mac without reset` passed, confirming the second-Mac flow blocks silent replacement and shows the reset-before-replacing message.

frictions: `pairing_flow_test.dart` does not include a dedicated expired-payload widget case, so the expired branch of VAL-PAIR-002 was validated with the existing related `pairing_qr_validator_test.dart` while malformed and reused user-facing states were confirmed in widget tests.
